title: Akshaya Private Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Akshaya Private Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
